name: Edge Network Services
notes:
If we're on a mutual IX, please peer with us via the route servers.

We do not support MD5 passwords on any BGP session.

We'll happily consider PNIs with networks when traffic levels exceed 5Gbps.

All bilateral and PNI peers must exchange their customers' null routes with us. These routes should be tagged '65535:666' (RFC 7999).

All peers should tag routes with a community that indicates the metro where the route was learned in their network.
